chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-602 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 09.09.2025 Mr. Muntazir Mehdi Laghari, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh ----- Learned Counsel for Petitioner states that since the grievance of the Petitioner has been redressed, he does not press present Petition. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
